column1: # CONUS2 subsurface indicator property lookup table.
# Source: Extracted from HydroFrame hf_hydrodata conus2_domain dataset via
# get_gridded_data() across five geologically diverse CONUS regions
# Verified that each indicator maps to exactly one set of property values
# (piecewise-constant parameterization) and that values are consistent
# Indicators 14-18 were not observed in any sampled region.
# Indicator 0 is a no-data/mask value (outside active domain).
#   permeability_y        [m/h]     horizontal permeability (y-direction; == permeability_x for all indicators)
# Indicators 1-12 correspond to sedimentary/alluvial hydrogeologic units.
# Indicators 19-28 correspond to bedrock/deeper geologic units.
